entries.title: Anthropic President Says Training Costs Drive AI Companies Toward Public Market
entries.summary: The cost of training AI models is driving companies like Anthropic to go public, Anthropic Co-Founder and President Daniela Amodei said Thursday (June 4). entries.title: Supabase Raises $500 Million as AI Agents Spark Database Explosion
entries.summary: Supabase raised $500 million in a Series F funding round to scale its open source Postgres development platform and grow its share of agentic infrastructure. The Supabase platform is used by many enterprises as the back-end structure for their AI-native applications, the company said in a Thursday (June 4) press release. entries.summary: Plaid and Fin have partnered to enable FinTechs and financial institutions to help their end users connect or reconnect their bank accounts securely within Fin Messenger chat. This capability is enabled by Plaid’s account linking service Plaid Link and Fin’s artificial intelligence agent for customer service. entries.summary: World Cup winner contracts on Polymarket have already generated roughly $1.5 billion in trading volume. For major sportsbooks, that is becoming difficult to ignore. For operators such as Flutter and DraftKings, the event is traditionally one of the industry’s biggest customer-acquisition opportunities. entries.summary: We’re excited to announce the general availability of the Lendscape Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server for asset finance.

entries.title: Triple-A puts multicurrency account on stablecoin rails
entries.summary: Today, Triple-A, a licensed global payment institution, announces the launch of the European rollout of stablecoin-enabled Multicurrency Accounts, giving global businesses access to local banking collection rails without the need to set up a local entity.

entries.title: Fasanara Capital launches investment platform for Ferrari-backed lending
entries.summary: Fasanara Capital today announces the launch of Fasanara Ferrari Lending Platform, a pioneering partnership dedicated to financing loans backed by Ferrari automobiles, alongside the Fasanara Ferrari Strategy: Owner’s Circle, a new investment strategy targeting attractive risk/return opportunities while offering investors privileged access to one of the world's most iconic luxury ecosystems.

entries.title: CFIT forms coalition to develop supported payments framework for learning disabled
entries.summary: The Centre for Finance, Innovation and Technology (CFIT) has formed a new coalition to focus on the development of a Supported Payments framework that will enable vulnerable customers to make everyday payments themselves, with a trusted thirdparty providing visibility, guidance and safeguards.

entries.summary: Revolut co-founder Vlad Yatsenko is stepping down as chief technology officer at the fintech giant and becoming a non-executive director.

entries.title: Robinhood enters Canada as it completes acquisition of WonderFi
entries.summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (“Robinhood”) has closed its acquisition of WonderFi, a Canadian leader in digital asset products and services.

entries.title: Colorado interchange fee law vetoed
entries.summary: The state’s governor shot down a bill aimed at curbing interchange fees on card transactions even though members of his own party passed the legislation.

entries.title: Klarna is an Amex-style brand, CEO says
entries.summary: The buy now, pay later provider is using fashion, beauty and lifestyle branding to emulate the card company’s early growth, Sebastian Siemiatkowski said.

entries.title: Ramp hits $44 billion valuation on $750m raise
entries.summary: Fast growing expense management firm Ramp has hit a valuation of $44 billion off a $750 million Series F funding round.

entries.title: Finastra offloads US core banking suite
entries.summary: Finastra a has sold its mid-market core banking portfolio to Cora Group, an operating group of Constellation Software.
